languages.text: "Тот пустотный боец, которому отказали в установке импланта — это твой сын?"
"The voidsman who was refused an implant — he is your son?"
languages.original_text: "Тот пустотный боец, которому отказали в установке импланта — это твой сын?"

traits.locale_text: "The voidsman fighter who was refused an implant — he is your son?"
"The void trooper who was refused an implant — he is your son?"
"The void trooper who was refused an implant — he is your son?"
"The voidsman fighter who was refused an implant — he is your son?"

languages.text: 「インプラントを拒否されたボイド・トルーパー、彼はあなたの息子？」
languages.original_text: "The void trooper who was refused an implant — he is your son?"

traits.locale_text: 「インプラントを拒否されたボイド・トルーパー、彼はあなたの息子？」

languages.text: "İmplant reddedilen uçsuz eri... O senin oğlun muydu?"
languages.original_text: "The voidsman who was refused an implant — he is your son?"

traits.locale_text: "İmplant reddedilen uçsuz eri... O senin oğlun muydu?"

languages.text: «El infante del vacío guerrero al que se denegó un implante... ¿es su hijo?».
languages.original_text: "The voidsman fighter who was refused an implant — he is your son?"

traits.locale_text: «El infante del vacío guerrero al que se denegó un implante... ¿es su hijo?».

languages.text: “那个想要植入物，但被拒绝了的舰船士兵是你的儿子？”
languages.original_text: "The voidsman fighter who was refused an implant — he is your son?"

traits.locale_text: “那个想要植入物，但被拒绝了的舰船士兵是你的儿子？”

languages.text: « Ce cosmomarin à qui l'on a refusé un implant, était-ce votre fils ? »
languages.original_text: "The voidsman fighter who was refused an implant — he is your son?"

traits.locale_text: « Ce cosmomarin à qui l'on a refusé un implant, était-ce votre fils ? »

languages.text: "Der Raumsoldat, dem ein Implantat verweigert wurde — er ist Euer Sohn?"
languages.original_text: "The voidsman fighter who was refused an implant — he is your son?"

traits.locale_text: "Der Raumsoldat, dem ein Implantat verweigert wurde — er ist Euer Sohn?"
